title: Ledebouria davidsoniae

Specifically, it belongs to the subfamily Scilloideae, which includes a diverse range of species commonly known as squill or wild hyacinth. The genus Ledebouria is a group of geophytes native to southern Africa, and Ledebouria davidsoniae is one of the many species within this genus.
